intended_use: CDM Insights is a post-processing image analysis software that assists trained healthcare practitioners in viewing, analyzing, and evaluating MR brain images of adults > 45 years of age. CDM Insights
intended_use_full: CDM Insights is a post-processing image analysis software that assists trained healthcare practitioners in viewing, analyzing, and evaluating MR brain images of adults > 45 years of age. CDM Insights provides the following functionalities: Automated segmentation and quantitative analysis of individual brain structures and white matter hyperintensities; Quantitative comparison of brain structures and derived values with normative data from a healthy population; Presentation of results for reporting that includes numerical values as well as visualization of these results
target_condition: Brain morphometry assessment; evaluation of brain atrophy and white matter hyperintensities in neurological disorders including Alzheimer's disease, mild cognitive impairment, frontotemporal dementia, and multiple sclerosis
ground_truth: US board-certified neuroradiologists for segmentation accuracy validation; gold standard comparison for brain regions and cortical surfaces
other_metrics: White matter hyperintensities mean Dice overlap score 0.66 (SD 0.15), exceeding acceptance criterion of 0.58; cortical region Dice scores ranged from 0.58 to 0.72; repeatability tested on 121 healthy subjects with repeated scans; reproducibility tested across over 1500 unique subjects aged 45-90 years
